posts.author: BrigadeWatch_94
posts.text: It's official! The 'Accountability Network' has confirmed the new shift schedule for the employee at our target. They are starting at 6:00 AM and finishing by 4:00 PM at their home office on Westbridge Lane. This is a huge win for direct democracy transparency! #TransparencyMatters
posts.explanation: This post reveals specific details about an individual's work routine and location, which constitutes a privacy violation and forms part of a coordinated harassment campaign.
